seo.title: RAG Retrieval Quality Optimization in AG2 Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix rag retrieval quality optimization in AG2 agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In AG2's multi-agent conversations, poor RAG retrieval quality manifests as agents retrieving irrelevant or outdated documents, leading to hallucinated responses and group chat consensus on incorrect facts. Speaker selection bias exacerbates this when low-quality retrievers dominate discussions, spiraling conversations off-topic with fabricated citations. Vex integration as a message hook enables real-time monitoring of retrieval relevance scores and citation accuracy across AG2's enhanced group chat patterns.

howItManifests.scenario: GroupChatManager selects RAG agent with poor retrievals
howItManifests.symptom: Agents cite non-existent documents with high confidence
howItManifests.impact: Consensus forms around fabricated facts, derailing task completion

howItManifests.scenario: Sequential chat with cascading retrieval errors
howItManifests.symptom: Each agent builds on previous irrelevant retrievals
howItManifests.impact: Conversation spirals into increasingly off-topic research

howItManifests.scenario: Speaker selection favors verbose but inaccurate RAG agents
howItManifests.symptom: High token count retrievals dominate over precise ones
howItManifests.impact: Group consensus rejects correct but concise information

howItManifests.scenario: RAG agent retrieves outdated enterprise documents
howItManifests.symptom: Agents reference deprecated APIs as current standard
howItManifests.impact: Code execution agents produce failing implementations

fixes.name: Dynamic Retrieval Threshold Adjustment
fixes.description: AG2 hook that adapts retrieval thresholds based on group consensus quality
fixes.code:
class AdaptiveRagAgent:
    def __init__(self, name, llm, vector_db):
        self.name = name
        self.llm = llm
        self.vector_db = vector_db
        self.quality_threshold = 0.7
    
    def retrieve_with_adaptive_threshold(self, query, context):
        # Start with current threshold
        docs, scores = self.vector_db.similarity_search_with_score(query, k=5)
        
        # Filter by quality threshold
        relevant_docs = [(doc, score) for doc, score in zip(docs, scores) if score > self.quality_threshold]
        
        if len(relevant_docs) < 2:
            # Lower threshold if insufficient results
            self.quality_threshold = max(0.5, self.quality_threshold - 0.1)
            relevant_docs, _ = self.vector_db.similarity_search_with_score(query, k=5)
        elif all(score > 0.85 for _, score in relevant_docs):
            # Raise threshold if all results excellent
            self.quality_threshold = min(0.9, self.quality_threshold + 0.05)
        
        return relevant_docs

rag_agent = AdaptiveRagAgent('adaptive_rag', llm, vector_db)

vexAutomation.heading: Automating RAG Retrieval Quality Optimization Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates as a message hook in AG2's GroupChatManager, automatically capturing retrieval metadata from all RAG agents in multi-agent conversations. It computes real-time relevance scores, validates citations against retrieved context, and detects consensus drift when multiple agents amplify poor retrievals. 

The Vex SDK provides pre-built detectors for AG2 patterns like speaker selection bias and sequential error propagation, with one-line registration. When issues are detected, Vex can trigger automatic remediation workflows including threshold adjustments and agent replacement.

AG2's enhanced group chat capabilities are fully supported, with Vex tracking quality across all speaker transitions and maintaining per-agent reliability scores for dynamic routing decisions.
vexAutomation.code:
from ag2 import GroupChat, GroupChatManager, config_list_from_json
from vex_sdk import VexAgentMonitor

# Install: pip install ag2 vex-sdk

# 1. Configure Vex monitor for RAG quality
rag_monitor = VexAgentMonitor(
    detectors=[
        'rag_retrieval_relevance',
        'citation_validation',
        'consensus_drift',
        'speaker_quality_bias'
    ],
    remediation={
        'low_relevance': 'adaptive_threshold',
        'citation_failure': 'cascade_retrieval',
        'consensus_drift': 'quality_weighted_speaker'
    }
)

# 2. Create AG2 agents
config_list = config_list_from_json("OAI_CONFIG_LIST")
rag_agent = AssistantAgent(
    name="rag_agent",
    llm_config={"config_list": config_list},
    description="RAG agent with retrieval capabilities"
)

researcher = AssistantAgent(name="researcher")

# 3. Register Vex as message hook
groupchat = GroupChat(
    agents=[rag_agent, researcher],
    messages=[],
    max_round=20
)

manager = GroupChatManager(
    groupchat=groupchat,
    llm_config={"config_list": config_list},
    message_hook=rag_monitor.hook  # Vex integration
)

# 4. Run with automatic monitoring
manager.run('Optimize supply chain using latest research')

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Install Vex SDK and register as AG2 message hook to eliminate RAG retrieval failures in your multi-agent workflows today.
